items.question: What ordering does a stack enforce?
items.explanation: Last-in, first-out — the most recently pushed item is the first popped.

items.question: Which Python type is the right choice for an in-memory FIFO queue?
items.explanation: deque is O(1) at both ends; list.pop(0) is O(n).

items.question: What is the time complexity of `heapq.heappush` and `heapq.heappop`?
items.explanation: A heap sifts the element along one branch from root to leaf, O(log n) levels.

items.question: Which traversal does a queue produce when used as the worklist?
items.explanation: FIFO order visits nodes level by level from the start.

items.question: How do you use `heapq` as a max-heap?
options: Negate the priority on push/pop or use heapq.nlargest
items.answer: Negate the priority on push/pop or use heapq.nlargest
